creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
Hello,

   This PR has been superceded by PR #10286.
   I thank Michael Haro for trying to help and for reminding me that I
have a port to take care of.
   Fortunately today I had the last exam -- so I woke up from the deads
in the end and finished up the port.

Thanks again,
Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)
